# Slider

A range slider component with track, thumb, labels, value text, and marker support. Composed of multiple sub-components for flexible layout.

## Import

```jsx
import {
  Slider,
  SliderTrack,
  SliderRange,
  SliderThumb,
  SliderControl,
  SliderLabel,
  SliderValueText,
  SliderMarker,
  SliderMarkerGroup,
} from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Sub-components

| Component | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `Slider` | The root wrapper (renders `Slider.Root`). Manages value, min, max, and step |
| `SliderControl` | Container for the track and thumb elements |
| `SliderTrack` | The track bar along which the thumb slides |
| `SliderRange` | The filled portion of the track representing the current value |
| `SliderThumb` | The draggable handle |
| `SliderLabel` | A label for the slider |
| `SliderValueText` | Displays the current value as text |
| `SliderMarker` | An individual marker along the track |
| `SliderMarkerGroup` | Container for marker elements |

## Slider (Root) Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `min` | `number` | `0` | The minimum allowed value |
| `max` | `number` | `100` | The maximum allowed value |
| `step` | `number` | `1` | The step interval between values |
| `defaultValue` | `number[]` | - | Initial value(s) for uncontrolled usage |
| `value` | `number[]` | - | Controlled value(s) |
| `onValueChange` | `(details: { value: number[] }) => void` | - | Callback fired when the value changes during drag |
| `onValueChangeEnd` | `(details: { value: number[] }) => void` | - | Callback fired when dragging ends |
| `colorPalette` | `string` | - | The color palette for the slider |
| `orientation` | `"horizontal" \| "vertical"` | `"horizontal"` | The orientation of the slider |
| `disabled` | `boolean` | `false` | Whether the slider is disabled |
| `ref` | `React.Ref` | - | Forwarded ref to the root element |

## Usage

### Basic

```jsx
<Slider defaultValue={[50]} min={0} max={100}>
  <SliderControl>
    <SliderTrack>
      <SliderRange />
    </SliderTrack>
    <SliderThumb index={0} />
  </SliderControl>
</Slider>
```

### With label and value text

```jsx
<Slider defaultValue={[30]} min={0} max={100}>
  <SliderLabel>Volume</SliderLabel>
  <SliderValueText />
  <SliderControl>
    <SliderTrack>
      <SliderRange />
    </SliderTrack>
    <SliderThumb index={0} />
  </SliderControl>
</Slider>
```

### With markers

```jsx
<Slider defaultValue={[50]} min={0} max={100} step={25}>
  <SliderControl>
    <SliderTrack>
      <SliderRange />
    </SliderTrack>
    <SliderThumb index={0} />
  </SliderControl>
  <SliderMarkerGroup>
    <SliderMarker value={0}>0%</SliderMarker>
    <SliderMarker value={25}>25%</SliderMarker>
    <SliderMarker value={50}>50%</SliderMarker>
    <SliderMarker value={75}>75%</SliderMarker>
    <SliderMarker value={100}>100%</SliderMarker>
  </SliderMarkerGroup>
</Slider>
```

### Range slider (two thumbs)

```jsx
<Slider defaultValue={[25, 75]} min={0} max={100}>
  <SliderControl>
    <SliderTrack>
      <SliderRange />
    </SliderTrack>
    <SliderThumb index={0} />
    <SliderThumb index={1} />
  </SliderControl>
</Slider>
```

### With color palette

```jsx
<Slider defaultValue={[60]} colorPalette="green">
  <SliderControl>
    <SliderTrack>
      <SliderRange />
    </SliderTrack>
    <SliderThumb index={0} />
  </SliderControl>
</Slider>
```

## Features

- Compound component pattern for fully customizable slider layouts
- Supports single value and range (multi-thumb) configurations
- Markers and value text for labeled scales
- Horizontal and vertical orientations
- Keyboard accessible with arrow key support
- Each sub-component forwards refs to its underlying DOM element
